_doc: BC pretraining config voor full-joint policy. Multi-head loss: movement direction/binaries + VR Gaussian-NLL op yaw/pitch + fire BCE + target_index CE.
_doc_multi_head_loss: Per-head loss weights. loss = w_movement*movement_loss + w_vr*gaussian_nll(yaw,pitch) + w_fire*(bce(fire)+bce(altFire)) + w_target*ce_confidence_weighted(target_logits, target_label, target_confidence).
